narrative:
Wauseon Three (precinct in Fulton County) has 896 registered voters, with 59.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.1 percentage points.
